evals.prompt: Here's the billing data for March 2026. Please generate the HLF invoice packages. Bill date is 14.03.2026, month is MAR, year 2026.
evals.expected_output: 17 per-state PDF invoice packages, each containing a covering letter, GST bill, and landscape case detail sheet merged into one PDF. Vidarbha should be auto-generated since no GST bill exists for it.

evals.prompt: I need to regenerate only the Rajasthan and Jharkhand invoice packages for March 2026. The GST bills are in the GST Bills folder.
evals.expected_output: Only 2 PDF packages generated (Rajasthan and Jharkhand), using --states-only flag.

evals.prompt: Run the April 2026 HLF billing. Here's the new excel. Bill date is 07.04.2026. The GST bills for April are in the GST Bills folder.
evals.expected_output: Invoice packages for all states present in the April billing data, with April 2026 dates and APR in invoice numbers.
